basic_details.job_title: ECHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Medical Officer, Pharmacist and More Posts
basic_details.post_name: Medical, Para Medical and Non-Medical Staff
basic_details.short_information: Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 7 Medical, Para Medical and Non-Medical Staff Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for government jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can download the application form from the official website and submit it offline.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: MBBS with 03 years experience after internship, B Pharmacy or 10+2 with Science + Diploma in Pharmacy with 03 years experience, B Sc Medical Lab Technology or Matric/10+2 with Science + Diploma in MLT with 05 years experience, Diploma in Dental Hygienist/Class-1 DH/DORA with 05 years experience, 8th class or GD trade, Literate with 05 years experience in Civil/Army health institution, Literate with 05 years experience
qualification.details: Medical Officer: MBBS with a minimum of 03 years of work experience after internship. Pharmacist: B Pharmacy from a recognized institute OR 10+2 with Science stream (Physics, Chemistry, Biology) from a recognized board, along with an approved Diploma in Pharmacy from an institute recognized by the Pharmacy Council of India and registered as a Pharmacist. Minimum 03 years' experience in pharmacy is required. Lab Technician: B.Sc (Medical Lab Technology) OR Matriculation/Higher Secondary/Senior Secondary (10+2) with Science from a Recognized institution/Board, along with a Diploma in Medical Lab Technology from a Recognized institution. Minimum 05 years' Experience in Lab is required. Dental Hygienist: Diploma holder in Dental Hygienist/Class-1 DH/DORA course (Armed Forces). Minimum 05 years' Experience in Dental Laboratory is required. Chowkidar: 8th class pass, or GD trade for Armed forces personnel. Female Attendant: Literate with a minimum of 05 years' experience in Civil/Army health institution. Safaiwala: Literate with a minimum of 05 years' experience.

how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for ECHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026 through offline mode should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.echs.gov.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date for the receipt of applications for the ECHS recruitment is 15th June 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in this ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies announced for various Medical, Para Medical, and Non-Medical Staff positions under the Ex-Servicemen Contributory Health Scheme (ECHS).

faq.question: Q3. What is the mode of application for ECHS jobs?
faq.answer: The application process for this ECHS recruitment is offline. Candidates need to download the application form and submit it via post or as specified in the notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary range for the ECHS posts?
faq.answer: The salary for the ECHS posts ranges from Rs. 21,800 to Rs. 95,000 per month, depending on the specific post and qualifications.

faq.question: Q5. What are the minimum qualifications required for the Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: For the Medical Officer post, candidates must possess an MBBS degree and have a minimum of 03 years of work experience after completing their internship.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for General/OBC categories in the official notification. It is advisable to check the detailed notification for any specific fee instructions.

faq.question: Q7. When is the interview date for the ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The interview date for the ECHS recruitment is scheduled for 22nd June 2026. Candidates are expected to be prepared for the interview on this date.

faq.question: Q8. Where can I download the ECHS application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of ECHS, which is www.echs.gov.in. Ensure you are downloading the correct form from the official source.

faq.question: Q9. What is the location of the ECHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The ECHS recruitment is for positions in Coimbatore, Tamil Nadu, with the pincode 641401.

faq.question: Q10. What type of job is offered through this ECHS notification?
faq.answer: The jobs offered through this ECHS notification are contractual in nature. This means the employment will be for a fixed term as per the terms and conditions of the scheme.
